steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word However signals a shift from the benefit of specialization to its downside.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B states that the 'akeke'e is highly specialized and therefore especially susceptible to habitat disturbances, which matches the idea introduced after However.

The other three either miss the vulnerability claim, describe unrelated relationships, or add details not in the passage.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
